metadata.description: Source-derived shadow tokens from approved Milestone 8 elevation and shadow input.

elevation-0.$description: Flat surfaces. Offset Y 0px, blur 0px, opacity 0%.

elevation-1.$description: Controls and small elements. Offset Y 1px, blur 4px, opacity 3%.

elevation-2.$description: Cards and floating panels. Offset Y 2px, blur 8px, opacity 4%.

elevation-3.$description: Dialogs and overlays. Offset Y 4px, blur 16px, opacity 5%.

elevation-4.$description: Modals and high-priority surfaces. Offset Y 8px, blur 24px, opacity 7%.
